meaning: n.[印度教]梵天,宇宙最高的永恒的实体或精神
examples: That Brahma is bereft of sense.
Worried, the Gods ran to Brahma for help.
Its major brands include Budweiser, Michelob, Stella Artois, Becks, Hoegarrden, Leffe, Bass and Brahma.
Mr Brahma was beaten and accused by villagers in Chirang district, on the border with Bhutan.
